macro.title: UWM adds VantageScore alongside FICO for conventional loans
macro.what: UWM will show FICO and VantageScore on no-cost credit reports for conventional loans, aligning with FHFA pilot plans.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Fed Holds Rates Steady, But Rare Dissents Signal Cloudy Outlook For Future Path
macro.what: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at its April 29 meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: ICE’s Courtenay Dunn outlines deregulatory housing priorities
macro.what: ICE’s Courtenay Dunn said Trump priorities include deregulation, cost cuts, credit score modernization and fintech rules.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: The Price Point: What $500,000 Buys Across America Right Now
macro.what: In this inaugural edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re starting with a rather fickle figure: $500,000
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Housing starts overachieved in March amid warning signs aplenty
housing.what: March starts reached 1.5 million, single-family 1.03 million, while permits fell 10.8% and completions dropped 13.5% year over year.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Figure’s Michael Tannenbaum warns rush to adopt AI could accelerate poor mortgage processes
housing.what: Figure CEO Michael Tannenbaum says AI can speed lending, but blockchain-based verification and modern infrastructure cut fraud and costs.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.what: In 2001, Maryam Amiri immigrated to the United States from Iran

housing.title: Everything we know about Real’s REMAX acquisition and the shift to tech-driven consolidation
housing.what: Industry observers say the deal reflects a broader push toward scale and efficiency amid a slower housing market and pressure on commissions.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The Reveal in NYC: This ‘One-of-a-Kind’ Apartment Just Off City Hall Park is Now Listed for $2.2 Million
housing.what: Surrounded by the hustle and bustle of Lower Manhattan, this two-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bathroom loft-style apartment is listed for $2,199,000
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Coming Soon in New Jersey: This 3-Bedroom, 2-Bath Fixer-Upper Less Than an Hour From NYC is Set to Hit the Market This Week
housing.what: Just under an hour drive away from New York City, this Woodbridge, New Jersey 1,121-square-foot house is set to hit the market this week with a list price of $499,000
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: HUD proposes rollback of equal access rule protections
